message:
refactor(browser): modularize worker with esbuild bundling

Split lanceql-worker.js (5.8k lines) into 10 maintainable modules:
- opfs-storage.js: OPFS file operations
- encryption.js: AES-GCM helpers
- data-types.js: DataType enum, LanceFileWriter
- worker-store.js: WorkerStore class
- worker-database.js: WorkerDatabase class
- worker-vault.js: WorkerVault class
- sql/tokenizer.js: TokenType, SQLLexer
- sql/parser.js: SQLParser
- sql/executor.js: SQL execution functions

Added esbuild bundling:
- esbuild.config.js: Bundle worker + client
- package.json: Updated build scripts
- Legacy fallback for client until modularized

96/100 tests passing (same as before).

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,9 @@
   "scripts": {
     "build": "npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js",
     "build:wasm": "cd ../.. && zig build wasm && cp zig-out/bin/lanceql.wasm packages/browser/dist/",
-    "build:js": "node scripts/build.js",
+    "build:js": "node esbuild.config.js",
+    "build:legacy": "node scripts/build.js",
+    "dev": "node esbuild.config.js --watch",
     "test": "node --test test/*.test.js",
     "prepublishOnly": "npm run build"
   },
